title: Phase 2 GBM-Based Aggregation Sensitivity and JRN Estimation on rel-f1
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-computed results from Phase 2 GBM-based aggregation sensitivity analysis on the RelBench rel-f1 (Formula 1) relational database. Processes 65 join-task pairs (13 FK joins x 5 tasks) with 1365 LightGBM models. Reproduces the full statistical analysis pipeline: probe-GT Spearman correlation, quadratic and piecewise regression for inverted-U hypothesis testing, Kruskal-Wallis across JRN tertiles, and generates a 6-panel visualization with JRN/sensitivity heatmaps, scatter plots, and statistical fits. Uses mini_demo_data.json containing all 65 examples with per-pair JRN, sensitivity CoV, and aggregation performance details.
